sql: SELECT u.id, u.name as user_name, o.id as order_id, o.amount, p.name as product_name, c.name as category_name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE u.status = #{userStatus} AND o.status IN (#{orderStatuses}) AND c.id IN (#{categoryIds}) AND o.amount >= #{minAmount} ORDER BY #{sortField}
templateSql:
SELECT
    <include refid="Frag_JoinUserCols"/>,    <include refid="Frag_JoinOrderCols"/>,
    p.name as product_name,
    c.name as category_name
FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON <include refid="Frag_JoinCondition"/>
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
<where>
    <if test="userStatus != null">
        AND u.status = #{userStatus}
    </if>
    <if test="orderStatuses != null and orderStatuses.size() > 0">
        AND o.status IN
        <foreach collection="orderStatuses" item="os" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{os}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="categoryIds != null and categoryIds.size() > 0">
        AND c.id IN
        <foreach collection="categoryIds" item="cid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{cid}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="minAmount != null">
        AND o.amount >= #{minAmount}
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
